poll.question: Tell Jade what she's come to mean, or keep the magic of these firepit nights as it is?

options.label: Tell her tonight
options.desc: Risk vulnerability; see if she feels it too

options.label: Keep it unspoken
options.desc: Let the warmth stay simple; protect what you have

options.label: Show her tomorrow
options.desc: Small honest moments—let her realize it her own way

in_play.label: Follow her heart
in_play.desc: Be honest with Ryan—let the spark grow
